description: Enhanced fuzzy search with Levenshtein distance, trigram similarity, relevance scoring, and autocomplete fallback
steps: Create lib/search/fuzzy.ts - Pure utility functions: levenshteinDistance(a, b), trigramSimilarity(a, b) (Dice coefficient on character trigrams). No external deps.

Create lib/search/relevance.ts - Search result scoring: scoreResult(query, productName) returns numeric score. Scoring: exact match (100) > starts-with (80) > word-starts-with (60) > contains (40) > fuzzy match with similarity > 0.3 (20 * similarity). Export rankResults(query, products) that sorts by score descending.

Modify app/api/products/route.ts - When search query 'q' is provided and Prisma returns < 3 results: fetch additional products (up to 50) without the name filter, run fuzzy matching via lib/search/relevance.ts, merge results. Include a 'relevanceScore' field in response items when q is present. Add 'suggestions' array to response with top fuzzy-matched product names when exact results are sparse.
Add comprehensive tests in tests/fuzzy-search.test.ts - Test levenshteinDistance, trigramSimilarity, scoreResult with various inputs including misspellings and partial matches
acceptance_criteria: lib/search/fuzzy.ts exports levenshteinDistance and trigramSimilarity functions
lib/search/relevance.ts exports scoreResult and rankResults functions
Product search API falls back to fuzzy matching when < 3 exact results found
Response includes relevanceScore when search query is present
Response includes suggestions array for fuzzy matches
Fuzzy search tests pass with correct distance/similarity calculations
verification: Run npx eslint . from apps/web/ and confirm no errors
Run npm run test from apps/web/ and confirm fuzzy search tests pass
